products.title: Pioneer® Diamante Pro™ 18,000 BTU 21 SEER2 230V High-Wall Ductless Mini-Split Air Conditioner Inverter Heat Pump with 16 Ft. Kit
products.description:
Summary

High Efficiency Diamante Pro™ Ductless Mini Split Heat Pump System
Cooling capacity: 18,000 BTU/H with 21.0 SEER2 / 10.5 EER2 efficiency
Heating capacity: 18,000 BTU/H with 9.5 HSPF2 / 3.41 COP2 efficiency
Voltage: 208/230V, 60Hz, 1Ph
High Wall-Mounted Ductless Air Conditioning & Heating System
Variable-Speed DC Inverter Driven Performance
Factory-Precharged with Environmentally Friendly R454b Refrigerant

Low Ambient Range Operation (As low as -4°F in Heating / As high as 122°F in Cooling)

Features

Heat Pump with Cooling, Heating, Dry, and Ventilation Modes
Dual-Drainage Ports
Washable, Reusable Air Filters
Dual-Axis Airflow (Motorized Up-Down and Left-Right Louvers)
Functional Remote with:

ECO and SLEEP Modes, for Energy-Conservation
Timer On/Off Control
TURBO, for Times of High-Demand
Self-Clean Cycle
MEMORY, to Recall Favorite Settings
IFEEL, to Detect and Adjust to Local Temperature



Technical Information & Performance

AHRI Certificate
Energy Guide
Submittal Sheet



System Kit


Power Supply: 208~230V, 60Hz, 1Ph

Cooling Rated Capacity: 18,000 BTU/h

Cooling Capacity Range: 4,090~18,400 BTU/h

Cooling SEER2: 21.0 BTU/W.h

Cooling EER2: 10.5 BTU/W.h

Heating Rated Capacity: 18,000 BTU/h

Heating Capacity Range: 4,090~19,000 BTU/h

Heating HSPF2 (Region IV/V): 9.5 / 8.2 BTU/W.h

Heating C.O.P.2 (47°F/5°F): 3.41 / 1.8 W/W

Refrigerant Type: R454b

Recommended Room Size: 500~750 sq ft

 Minimum Room Size: 40 sq ft

Piping Diameter: 3/8" (Gas) / 1/4" (Liquid)

AHRI Reference: 217048744




Indoor Unit


Part Number: WT018GLSI20HLF

Air Flow (Turbo/Hi/Med/Lo/Mute): 617 / 575 / 511 / 411 / 382 CFM

Sound Level (Turbo/Hi/Med/Lo/Mute): 49 / 47 / 42 / 37 / 32 dB(A)

Product Dimensions (WDH): 39"-3/4 x 9" x 12"-3/8 Inches

Carton Dimensions (WDH): 43"-1/8 x 11"-3/4 x 15"-3/8 Inches

Net / Gross Weight: 27.6 / 33.7 lbs



Outdoor Unit


Part Number: YN018GLSI20RPF

Breaker Needed: 20A (double-pole)

Sound Level: 55 dB(A)

Net Dimensions (WDH): 34" x 13"-3/4 x 23"-3/4 Inches

Carton Dimensions (WDH): 35"-1/2 x 16" x 27" Inches

Net / Gross Weight: 70.5 / 82.7 lbs



Dimension Chart

products.title: Pioneer® Multi-Zone 18,000 BTU Quantum Ultra Wall-Mounted Indoor Section Ductless Mini-Split Wi-Fi Inverter++ Air Conditioner Heat Pump 230V
products.description:
Specifications


Part Number: WT018GLSI24HLG


Power Supply: 208~230V, 60Hz, 1Ph

Refrigerant Type: R454B

Recommended Room Size: 500~750 sq ft

Minimum Room Size: 51 sq ft

Product Dimensions (WDH): 43"-1/8 x 8"-3/4" x 13" Inches


Carton Dimensions (WDH): 45"-7/8 x 11"-5/8 x 16" Inches


Net / Gross Weight: 30.9 / 35.3 lbs

Piping Diameter: 1/2" (Gas) / 1/4" (Liquid)

Performance



Cooling Rated Capacity: 18,000 BTU/h

Cooling Capacity Range: 4,000~19,000 BTU/h


Cooling SEER2: 23.0 BTU/W.h


Cooling EER2: 12.5 BTU/W.h


Heating Rated Capacity: 19,000 BTU/h

Heating Capacity Range: 4,000~21,000 BTU/h

Heating HSPF2 (Region IV/V): 10.0 / 8.2 BTU/W.h

Heating C.O.P.2 (47°F/5°F): 3.64 / 1.8 W/W

Air Flow (Turbo/Hi/Med/Lo/Mute): 735 / 676 / 529 / 423 / 394 CFM


Sound Level (Turbo/Hi/Med/Lo/Mute): 50 / 47 / 43 / 38 / 34 dB(A)


Moisture Removal: 110 Pint/day

Multi-Zone Compatibility


Dual (2) Zone Condenser: YN020GLSI24M2G


Triple (3) Zone Condenser: YN030GLSI24M3G


Quad (4) Zone Condenser: YN040GLSI24M4G


Quint (5) Zone Condenser: YN050GLSI24M5G


What's Included

Indoor Unit
Wireless Remote Control
Wi-Fi Module w/ Free App
Full Installation Kit (unless "No Installation Kit" is selected)
Flare Connection Leak Guard Sealer
Installation Manual
User’s Manual
Manufacturer Warranty

products.title: Pioneer® Diamante Pro™ 12,000 BTU 20 SEER2 230V High-Wall Ductless Mini-Split Air Conditioner Inverter Heat Pump with 16 Ft. Kit
products.description:
Summary

High Efficiency Diamante Pro™ Ductless Mini Split Heat Pump System
Cooling capacity: 12,000 BTU/H with 20.0 SEER2 / 11.2 EER2 efficiency
Heating capacity: 12,000 BTU/H with 9.5 HSPF2 / 3.41 COP2 efficiency
Voltage: 208/230V, 60Hz, 1Ph
High Wall-Mounted Ductless Air Conditioning & Heating System
Variable-Speed DC Inverter Driven Performance
Factory-Precharged with Environmentally Friendly R454b Refrigerant

Low Ambient Range Operation (As low as -4°F in Heating / As high as 122°F in Cooling)

Features

Heat Pump with Cooling, Heating, Dry, and Ventilation Modes
Dual-Drainage Ports
Washable, Reusable Air Filters
Dual-Axis Airflow (Motorized Up-Down and Left-Right Louvers)
Functional Remote with:

ECO and SLEEP Modes, for Energy-Conservation
Timer On/Off Control
TURBO, for Times of High-Demand
Self-Clean Cycle
MEMORY, to Recall Favorite Settings
IFEEL, to Detect and Adjust to Local Temperature



Technical Information & Performance

AHRI Certificate
Energy Guide
Submittal Sheet



System Kit


Power Supply: 208~230V, 60Hz, 1Ph

Cooling Rated Capacity: 12,000 BTU/h

Cooling Capacity Range: 3,400~13,000 BTU/h

Cooling SEER2: 20.0 BTU/W.h

Cooling EER2: 11.2 BTU/W.h

Heating Rated Capacity: 12,000 BTU/h

Heating Capacity Range: 3,400~13,900 BTU/h

Heating HSPF2 (Region IV/V): 9.5 / 8.2 BTU/W.h

Heating C.O.P.2 (47°F/5°F): 3.41 / 1.8 W/W

Refrigerant Type: R454b

Recommended Room Size: 350~500 sq ft


Minimum Room Size: 34 sq ft

Piping Diameter: 3/8" (Gas) / 1/4" (Liquid)

AHRI Reference: 217048743




Indoor Unit


Part Number: WT012GLSI20HLF

Air Flow (Turbo/Hi/Med/Lo/Mute): 342 / 270 / 235 / 200 / 152 CFM

Sound Level (Turbo/Hi/Med/Lo/Mute): 45 / 42 / 35 / 30 / 28 dB(A)

Product Dimensions (WDH): 31"-7/8 x 8" x 11"-1/2 Inches

Carton Dimensions (WDH): 34"-7/8 x 10"-3/4 x 14"-3/8 Inches

Net / Gross Weight: 19.8 / 26.5 lbs



Outdoor Unit


Part Number: YN012GLSI20RPF

Breaker Needed: 15A (double-pole)

Sound Level: 55 dB(A)

Net Dimensions (WDH): 31" x 11"-1/2 x 19"-3/8 Inches

Carton Dimensions (WDH): 33" x 13"-3/8 x 22"-3/4 Inches

Net / Gross Weight: 55.1 / 66.1 lbs
